attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WIQRT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
 WIQRT.PRODUCT_KEY ,
 WIQRT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ,
 WIQRT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
 WIQRT.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIQRT.EDW_CREATE_USER ,
 WIQRT.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
 WIQRT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
 WIQRT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
 WIQRT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WIQRT.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG, /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/
 WIQRT.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG, /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/
 WIQRT.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG, /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/ 
 WIQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, /* OA Q1FY15 changes */
 WIQRT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY /* OA Q1FY15 changes */
,WIQRT.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
,WIQRT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BKGS_CURR_LAST_QRTR  WIQRT
 WHERE WIQRT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT NOT IN(
 SELECT WIQRT1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_BKGS_CURR_LAST_QRTR  WIQRT1
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
 ON( WIQRT1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 AND  CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG='Y' ))
 AND WIQRT.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG='Y'
 /* AND WIQRT.PRODUCT_KEY NOT IN ( SELECT HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY  FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BUNDLE_PRODUCT  
 WHERE BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL') */
 /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 AND 
 (
 (WIQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'STANDALONE' AND WIQRT.PRODUCT_KEY NOT IN ( SELECT HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY  FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BUNDLE_PRODUCT WHERE BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD ='ACTUAL')) 
 OR WIQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BUNDLE','OFFSET','BIB', 'BIB OFFSET') /* NRS MPOB Change */
 )
 /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */

SELECT 
 WIQRT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
 WIQRT.PRODUCT_KEY ,
 WIQRT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ,
 WIQRT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
 WIQRT.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT ,
 WIQRT.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIQRT.EDW_CREATE_USER ,
 WIQRT.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
 WIQRT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
 WIQRT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
 WIQRT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WIQRT.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG, /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/
 WIQRT.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG, /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/
 WIQRT.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG, /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/ 
 WIQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, /* OA Q1FY15 changes */
 WIQRT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY /* OA Q1FY15 changes */
 ,WIQRT.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
  ,WIQRT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BKGS_CURR_LAST_QRTR  WIQRT,
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
 WHERE WIQRT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 AND CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG='Y' 
 AND WIQRT.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG='Y'
 /* AND WIQRT.PRODUCT_KEY NOT IN ( SELECT HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY  FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BUNDLE_PRODUCT
 WHERE BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL' ) */
 /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 AND 
 (
 (WIQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'STANDALONE' AND WIQRT.PRODUCT_KEY NOT IN ( SELECT HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY  FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BUNDLE_PRODUCT WHERE BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD ='ACTUAL')) 
 OR WIQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BUNDLE','OFFSET','BIB','BIB OFFSET') /* NRS MPOB Change */
 )
 /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
